description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly white and black color scheme accented by orange and blue highlights. Its head is large and round, with a single blue circular element on each side, possibly functioning as a sensor or camera. The torso is robust and slightly segmented, with two prominent orange panels on the back that may serve as energy packs or cooling vents. The limbs are proportionate and jointed, allowing for a wide range of motion, and the hands and feet are simplified, with no visible fingers or toes. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly. The overall build suggests durability and mobility, suitable for urban environments where interaction with humans and navigation of complex spaces are required.
description: A sleek, white and black humanoid robot with orange and blue accents, jointed limbs, and a smooth, glossy surface. Its design is futuristic and functional, with prominent sensors and back panels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, segmented torso, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the round head with a blue sensor, the arm and leg profile, and the orange back panel.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the face area, chest, and the symmetrical orange panels on the upper back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the round head, blue sensor, and orange back panel.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs straight, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot is covered in integrated, smooth panels with colored accents.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a large, round surface with a single blue circular element on each side, lacking a mouth or nose and with no expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for flexible movement; hands and feet are simple and rigid.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible blue circular sensors on each side of the head, likely cameras or visual sensors; possible additional sensors integrated into the torso and back panels.
